OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

I wasted hours scouring the city, only to find nothing. It was a costly lesson in skepticism. Nowadays, I'm more cautious, relying on trusted sources and fact-checking before sharing or engaging with content. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend a few times monthly on social media

response_parsed.opinion: As I navigate the vast expanse of social media, I've come to realize that fake content is a persistent plague. In my younger years, I was more tolerant of its presence, but now that I'm in my eighties, I've developed a more discerning eye. I recall a time when I fell prey to a viral video that promised to reveal a hidden treasure in Naples. The video was convincing, but it was, of course, a fabrication. I wasted hours scouring the city, only to find nothing. It was a costly lesson in skepticism. Nowadays, I'm more cautious, relying on trusted sources and fact-checking before sharing or engaging with content. I've even started to use browser extensions that help filter out fake news and propaganda. It's a cat-and-mouse game, but I'm determined to stay ahead of the curve. I've also taken to seeking out content from reputable outlets and experts in various fields. This way, I'm more likely to encounter well-researched and accurate information. I must admit, it's not always easy to discern fact from fiction, but I've learned to be patient and take my time. By being more mindful of the sources I consult and the information I share, I've become a more discerning and responsible social media user. As I've grown older, I've come to appreciate the value of authenticity and the importance of critical thinking. I hope that younger generations will learn from my mistakes and take a more nuanced approach to navigating the complex landscape of social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I've developed a more discerning eye for fake content over the years, and I've learned to rely on trusted sources and fact-checking before sharing or engaging with content. I've even started to use browser extensions that help filter out fake news and propaganda. I've also taken to seeking out content from reputable outlets and experts in various fields. I'm more mindful of the sources I consult and the information I share, and I've become a more discerning and responsible social media user.
